creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Kyle Evans from comment #13)

Really apologize for the triple e-mail, I just noticed the version number attached to this...

This report here is actually likely irrelevant to anything I just sent, because if_tun in 11.2/12.0 was quite broken (as revealed by wireguard). 11.3 and the impending 12.1 both have fixes for a number of lifetime issues that may look quite similar to what you're seeing here. I would recommend trying with either of those two, or -CURRENT, along with the attached patch to address potential ownership problems.
